_guide.description: Customizable Vietnam ESCO end-to-end case file for proforma_vietnam.run_case. This file is a template. To run a scenario: create a sub-folder (e.g. case_1, case_2, ...) next to this template, copy this case.json into it, edit values, and run proforma_vietnam.run_case --case <sub-folder>/case.json. Outputs are written into the same folder as --case. Monetary inputs and report outputs in this sample are USD unless the field name explicitly says VND or exchange_rate_vnd_per_usd. This case enables dppa.type=grid_dppa_cfd with a strike at 2000 VND/kWh and an 8760 contract volume shaped to case_2 total RE output incl. would-be export (curtailed under self-consumption).
required_before_run: Create the 8760-row hourly load CSV referenced by load_profile.path.
Confirm latitude and longitude are the project site coordinates.
Confirm tariff voltage_level and tou_schedule match the customer tariff.
Keep esco_contract.esco_energy_discount_fraction present; the report download requires it.

input_options.tariff.exchange_rate_vnd_per_usd: Required when tariff.currency is usd. It converts EVN VND tariff inputs, or any field explicitly named VND, into USD. The optimizer and Vietnam pro forma report use USD values.
input_options.tariff.two_component_pilot_enabled: false uses standard EVN energy-only TOU tariff. true uses the configured EVN two-component pilot tariff with hourly energy rates plus monthly demand_rates.
input_options.tariff.evn_energy_escalation_rate: Annual EVN energy tariff escalation used in the Vietnam ESCO cash flow. Use decimal fractions, e.g. 0.04 for 4% per year.
input_options.tariff.evn_capacity_escalation_rate: Annual EVN demand or capacity charge escalation used in the Vietnam ESCO cash flow. Use decimal fractions, e.g. 0.04 for 4% per year.
input_options.financial.annual_om_usd: Optional override only. It is omitted in this sample so the workbook uses REopt year-one O&M output.
input_options.technologies.pv: PV size is optimized by core REopt. min_kw and max_kw are lower and upper bounds. Set min_kw and max_kw equal only when you want to force a fixed PV size.
input_options.technologies.pv.degradation_fraction: Annual PV production degradation fraction. Example: 0.005 means 0.5% per year.
input_options.technologies.pv.production_factor_series: Optional 8760-length AC kWh per kW DC installed. Set this to bypass the PVWatts fetch entirely; useful when you have a measured or site-specific solar production profile. If omitted, the case builder fetches the series from NREL PVWatts v8 using technologies.pv.pvwatts and caches it under outputs/pvwatts_cache/.
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts: PVWatts v8 lookup parameters. Used only when technologies.pv.production_factor_series is omitted. Defaults shown below match the values in this sample.
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts.tilt: Module tilt from horizontal in degrees (0-90). Default 10. For Vietnam (low latitude) 10-15 degrees is typical.
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts.azimuth: Module azimuth in degrees (0=north, 90=east, 180=south, 270=west). Default 180 (due south, optimal for northern hemisphere).
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts.array_type: Module mounting type. 0=fixed open rack, 1=fixed roof-mounted, 2=1-axis tracking, 3=1-axis backtracked, 4=2-axis tracking. Default 1.
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts.module_type: PV module performance class. 0=standard, 1=premium, 2=thin film. Default 0.
input_options.technologies.pv.pvwatts.losses: System loss percent (0-99) covering soiling, wiring, mismatch, availability, etc. Default 14.
input_options.technologies.storage: Battery size is optimized by core REopt. min_kw/max_kw bound battery power; min_kwh/max_kwh bound battery energy. Set min and max equal only when you want to force a fixed battery size.
input_options.technologies.storage.installed_cost_cons: Fixed one-time battery installed cost in USD that does not scale with kW or kWh, such as controls, integration, mobilization, or interconnection. Use 0 when those costs are already included in installed_cost_per_kw or installed_cost_per_kwh.
input_options.technologies.storage.om_cost_fraction_of: Core REopt field: annual storage O&M as a fraction of total installed storage cost. Total installed storage cost includes installed_cost_per_kw times optimized kW, installed_cost_per_kwh times optimized kWh, and installed_cost_constant. Example: 0.02 means 2% of total installed storage cost per year.
input_options.technologies.storage.replacement_costs: Replacement fields are optimizer inputs. Use replace_cost_per_kw, replace_cost_per_kwh, and replace_cost_constant with their corresponding replacement year fields.
input_options.esco_contract.esco_energy_discount_fract: Multiplier applied to EVN time-specific energy tariff for ESCO energy revenue, e.g. 0.90 means ESCO charges 90% of EVN energy tariff.
input_options.esco_contract.demand_savings_esco_share: Share of demand-charge savings allocated to ESCO, e.g. 0.80 means ESCO keeps 80% and offtaker keeps 20%.
input_options.esco_contract.grid_charging_enabled: false for base PV-charged battery case; true only for grid-charging scenario analysis.

commands.create_scenario: mkdir outputsietnam_case actory_a\case_1 && copy outputsietnam_case actory_a\case.json outputsietnam_case actory_a\case_1\case.json

case.name: Factory A Vietnam DPPA Grid CfD Minimum BESS
